name: Slack Permalink for Waiting-on-Operator Escalations
goal: Add a Slack permalink to daemon-posted "Waiting on Operator" escalation messages, and a Link field to the Brain-authored [BLOCKED] escalation template.

tasks.name: SlackBot permalink + update-message support
tasks.description: Add get_permalink, update_message, and a prefix property to SlackBot in slack_interface.py, with tests in test_slack_interface.py.

steps.description: Write tests: TestGetPermalink (3 tests), TestUpdateMessage (3 tests), TestSlackBotPrefixProperty (1 test) appended to test_slack_interface.py
steps.command: cd commander && PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1 python -m pytest tests/test_slack_interface.py -v -k "TestGetPermalink or TestUpdateMessage or TestSlackBotPrefixProperty"
steps.expected: FAIL — AttributeError: 'SlackBot' object has no attribute 'get_permalink'

steps.description: Implement get_permalink, update_message, and prefix property on SlackBot in slack_interface.py
steps.command: cd commander && PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1 python -m pytest tests/test_slack_interface.py -v

tasks.name: Wire permalink enrichment into _maybe_capture_operator_wait
tasks.description: Update _maybe_capture_operator_wait in main.py to fetch a permalink after posting and edit the message in place to include it, with new integration tests.

steps.command: cd commander && PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1 python -m pytest tests/test_main_operator_wait.py -v
steps.expected: FAIL — test_operator_wait_updates_message_with_permalink fails because update_message is never called

steps.description: Replace the post_message call in _maybe_capture_operator_wait (main.py:1493-1498) with the post -> get_permalink -> update_message sequence
steps.command: cd commander && PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1 python -m pytest tests/test_main_operator_wait.py -v

tasks.name: Add required Link field to workflow.md Decision Format
tasks.description: Add a required **Link:** field to the Decision Format template in workflow.md, pointing to context grounding the decision (not a self-referential Slack link).

steps.description: No tests required: pure documentation/template content with no runtime code path to exercise.
Edit the Decision Format block (workflow.md:736-761) to add the **Link:** field after **To unblock:**, plus guidance sentence

tasks.name: Full suite verification and doc staging
tasks.description: Run the full test suite to confirm no regressions, then stage the design and plan docs.

steps.command: cd commander && PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1 python -m pytest tests/ -v
steps.expected: All tests PASS, including 10 new tests across the two modified test files, no regressions
